task.title: Requeue failed TTS segments in the hybrid pipeline
task.objective: Replace the hybrid pipeline TODO that drops failed TTS synthesis work with a bounded in-memory retry/requeue path so transient segment synthesis failures can be retried before the book is finalized.
acceptance_criteria: Add a strict TDD test in internal/pipeline that proves a segment whose first TTS synthesis fails is requeued and later synthesized successfully.
Add bounded retry tracking in the hybrid pipeline only; do not change provider interfaces or parser/OCR behavior.
Failed segments are requeued ahead of later idle completion checks and do not cause completePipeline to mark the book synthesized until retried work is exhausted or successful.
If a segment exhausts the bounded retry budget, mark pipeline/book state as error rather than silently claiming synthesized completion.
task.stop_condition: Stop after this narrow hybrid TTS segment requeue behavior and summary; do not implement parser/OCR or character KB.
validation: If go exists: go test ./internal/pipeline; otherwise record blocked
